ksa_text: Skill in communicating AI risk findings to technical and non-technical audiences, translating statistical risk measures into business impact terms.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-S-001 (Risk Management/Skill) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.526, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.526). Core signal: 0, OOS signals: 0, seniority: appropriate. Risk Management at this signal level does not meet inclusion threshold for RLHF Specialist.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.526, and Risk Management (RM) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA (composite 0.526)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis does not surface this Risk Management competency as a standard RLHF Specialist requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
